case_title: SHEREE L.KASLIKOSKI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/CHRISTOPHER ROACH
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/CHRISTOPHER ROACH
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCSICO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/CHRISTOPHER ROACH

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KASLIKOWSKI, SHEREE L. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/CHRISTOPHER ROACH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER (SC-105A)ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY PLTF. "YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD". HEARING DATE SET ON APRIL 23, 2008 @10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-02-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANTS APPEARED AT APRIL 23, 2008 HEARING, WAIVED SERVICE AND NOTICE OF HEARING. THE COURTS FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIED WITH THE GOVERNMENT CLAIM REQUIREMENT. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR TRIAL ON THE MERITS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SC-105A ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER, RETURNED "UNABLE TO FORWARD/INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-30-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASLIKOWSKI, SHEREE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/CHRISTOPHER ROACH $2,137.50 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,212.50, THE COURT PREVIOUSLY FOUND THAT PLAINTIFF HAD SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIED WITH GOVERNMENT CLAIMS STATUTE. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS, AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
